name: Thalem Armwrestling
tagline: Training and community app for armwrestling athletes.
description: A training and community app built for armwrestling athletes. Log workouts, track match results, browse an exercise library, and connect with other pullers.

name: Project Phase Tracker
tagline: Offline-first project tracker. Idea → Build → Fix → Done.
description: Manage multiple projects by moving each through a simple lifecycle. Runs entirely in your browser — no accounts, no sync, no distractions.
features: Four phases: Idea, Build, Fix, Done
Inline project inspector for notes and due dates
Sort and search by phase, date, or update time
Fully offline — data stored in browser
for_who: Anyone who wants structure without overhead
